input.topic: BlueHammer incident evidence and taxonomy rebuild
input.notes: Reprocess the BlueHammer incident article from primary-source evidence and clearly separate the public discoverer/discloser from any actual threat actor attribution. Preserve the event if the incident is supportable, but reduce or retire unsupported exploit-chain, ATT&CK, and active-exploitation claims if they cannot be anchored to current primary or authoritative secondary reporting.

history.note: Queued follow-on evidence rebuild for BlueHammer after corpus review found discoverer attribution conflation and source-quality overreach.
